titleStmt.title: SII 20.51: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 51. (B.K. No. 67 of 1936-37.) KUḶĒKUMAṬGI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the left wall of Chandraśēkharadēva temple.

summary.p: The record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 2, Piṁgala, Pushya, śu. 7, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1077, December 24. The tithi, however, was śu. 2 and not śu. 7.

The inscription records gifts of land for the benefit of the temple of Chaṇḍēśvara at Kumbiṭṭage, by Mahāsāmanta Siṁgarasa of Siyaḷāra family and Udāyadityarasa. It also records gifts of land, garden and oil to the same temple and also to the temple of Vināyaka and Ādityadēva by Kētaladēvi, queen of Tribhuvanamalladēva. The latter is said to have been ruling from his camping place at Ponuguppe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī
svasti samastabhuvanāsrayaṁ śrīpritvīvallabhaṁ ma
hārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
srayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhu
vanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ ponugu
ppeyappayaṇavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkatā vinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu tatpādapadmōpajīvi . sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāsāmaṁtaṁ vīraśrīkāṁtaṁ
tagaranagarādhīśvaraṁ subhaṭamahēśvaraṁ śiyaḷāravaṁ
sōdbhavaṁ vibhavādharīkritapurūravaṁ ḍaṁgārabhē
rīnirgghōṣaṇaṁ samaraikabhīṣaṇaṁ suvaṁrṇṇagaruḍa
dhvajaṁ vimaḷakīrttidhvajaṁ nāyigana cakraṁ paraca
kravakraṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī
manmahāsāmaṁtaṁ siṁgarasaru Udeyādityarasaruṁ
śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 2 neya piṁgaḷa saṁ
vatsarada pusyasudda 7 Ādivāraduttarāya
ṇasaṁkrāntiyaṁdu kuṁbiṭṭageya caṁḍēsvarakke Ā
polada kakkaneḻamēla baṭṭeyiṁ Issuṁkadaluṁ O
ṟaṭana kōlalu biṭṭa keyi mattaroḷage dēvaraṁ trikā
ḷaṁ pūjisuva māṇigaḷge matta 2 paṟekāṟarggaṁ hāḍuva
rggaṁ matta 4 śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvarārddhaṁgi kēta
ladēviyaru caṇḍēsvaradēvargge dhārapūrbbaka
māḍi Oṟaṭana kōlalu biṭṭa keyi matta 14 yavaṟoḷage
dēvaraṁgabhōgakka matta 2 vināyakadēvaraṁ pūjisuva mā
ṇige matta 1 Ādityadēvaraṁ pūjisuva māṇige matta 1
Ācajyara kavaḍi kaccuṭakke matta 2 maṭada tapō
dhanarggaṁ Abhyāgatarggaṁ satrakke biṭṭa matta 8 Evata
nūra baṭṭeyiṁ tenkaṇa gaddemaṁ Ā gaddeyiṁ paḍu
vaṇa tōṭamuṁ puradoḷagēnoṁdādaḍaṁ dēvara
tta Alliya gāṇada teṟeyuṁ gāṇaveyile Eṁṇneyuṁ dēvargge
Intidellavaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāra māḍi kādūḍuvaru Ūra
prabhuvuṁ mūliganuṁ prajegaḷuṁ dātārarāgi pratipāḷi
suvarintī dharmmakkāvanorbbammanavavana kāyakarmmado
ḷupadravaṁ māḍuvanuṁ Adanupēkṣegeydippa prabhuvuṁ pra
jegaḷuṁ mūliganuṁ svāna gārddapa cāṇḍāḷaru gaṁgātīrado
ḷuṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷamippa brāṁhmaṇaru kavileyumana
ḷida pātakakke salvaru . sāmānyōyaṁ dharma
sētunripāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyaḥ bhavadbhiḥ sarbbānētā
bhāginaṁ pārttiva bhūyō bhūyō yūcatē rāmabhadra .
svadattāṁ paṭhadattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . śrī śrī śrī
bhasmāṁkurarappa tapōdhanara dēvara
ṭṭa salla .
Digital edition of SII 20.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
